description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named feedparser that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has two jobs: code and docs. The code job runs on a matrix of Python versions and operating systems, checking out the repo, setting up Python, caching the virtual environment, creating the virtual environment if necessary, and running tox. The docs job builds documentation on ubuntu-latest, checking out the repo, setting up Python 3.9, caching the virtual environment, creating the virtual environment if necessary, and testing the documentation build with tox.
